sponsor.seasonStartIntroPullout: Sponsor income · Season start (intro {amount} ×{modifier} · sponsor pullout active)
sponsor.seasonStartVariablePullout: Sponsor income · Season start (base {base} + variable {variable} ×{modifier} · sponsor pullout active)
sponsor.seasonStartFallbackPullout: Sponsor income · Season start (fallback {amount} ×{modifier} · sponsor pullout active)

tx.loanRepaymentFinal: Loan installment paid. Loan fully repaid! 🎉
tx.forcedDebtRepaymentFinal: Forced sale proceeds paid off your loan in full
tx.forcedDebtRepaymentRemaining: Forced sale proceeds paid down debt (remaining: {remaining} CZ$)
tx.loanInterest: Loan interest ({rate}%): added to loan debt, not deducted from balance

warning.negativeNet: Expected deficit: {value} CZ$ next season. Sell a rider, reduce active loans, or negotiate a better sponsor.
warning.debtNearCeiling: Debt is {ratio}% of cap ({totalDebt} / {ceiling} CZ$). The board is worried.
warning.debtGrowing: Debt is {ratio}% of cap. Watch the interest burden.
warning.debtTrend: At the current deficit you'll hit the debt cap within 2 seasons. Act now.
warning.salaryExceedsSponsor: Salaries ({salary} CZ$) exceed sponsor ({sponsor} CZ$). Quiet operations no longer cover the wages.

loanCreatedShort.title: Loan created
loanCreatedShort.message: You took out a short-term loan of {principal} CZ$. Fee: {fee} CZ$. Total repayment: {totalOwed} CZ$.

loanCreatedLong.title: Loan created
loanCreatedLong.message: You took out a long-term loan of {principal} CZ$. Fee: {fee} CZ$. Total repayment: {totalOwed} CZ$.

emergencyLoan.title: ⚠️ Emergency loan opened
emergencyLoan.message: Your team couldn't cover wages. An emergency loan of {amount} CZ$ was opened automatically with a {feeRate}% fee and {interestRate}% interest. Total debt: {totalOwed} CZ$.

emergencyLoanBreach.title: 🚨 Debt cap exceeded
emergencyLoanBreach.message: Your emergency loan pushes the team's debt {breachAmount} CZ$ over the division cap of {ceiling} CZ$. You can keep operating, but you MUST cut costs (sell riders, drop star contracts) before the next season ends to avoid a debt spiral.

emergencyLoanEscalation.title: The board freezes transfers
emergencyLoanEscalation.message: Your team has needed an emergency loan {streak} seasons in a row. The board freezes transfers until your finances stabilize.

loanPaidOff.title: ✅ Loan repaid
loanPaidOff.message: Congratulations! You've fully repaid your loan.

boardPlanExpired.title: Board plan expired
boardPlanExpired.message: {headline}. {summary} Satisfaction: {satisfaction}%. Negotiate a new plan with the board.

boardMidMessage.good: The board is pleased with your progress.
boardMidMessage.moderate: The board is moderately pleased with your progress.
boardMidMessage.bad: The board is worried about your progress in the plan.

boardChairmanReplaced.title: The board has chosen a new chairman
boardChairmanReplaced.message: After two disappointing plan seasons, the board has replaced the chairman. {chairmanLabel} takes over. Expect a new tone in upcoming negotiations.

boardForcedListing.title: The board demands a sale
boardForcedListing.message: Satisfaction is at {satisfaction}%. The board has force-listed {riderName} at {askingPrice} CZ$.

boardSponsorPullout.title: Sponsor pulls out
boardSponsorPullout.message: The board reports that a main sponsor has pulled out after the season. Sponsor income drops by 10% next season.

boardBonusOffer.title: Bonus offer from the board
boardBonusOffer.message: The board is impressed ({satisfaction}% satisfaction, {goalsMet}/{goalsTotal} goals met). They offer +{bonusAmount} CZ$ for an extra goal: {goalLabel}. Accept or decline on the Board page.

divisionPromoted.title: Promoted! 🎉
divisionPromoted.message: Congratulations! Your team moves up to Division {division}.

boardT3Reminder.title: The board is waiting for your {planLabel}
boardT3Reminder.message: You have {daysLeft} days left to negotiate your {planLabel}. If you don't act, the board will decide.

academySigned.title: Academy signing complete
academySigned.message: Your academy prospect has joined your academy.

seasonStarted.title: Season {number} has started
seasonStarted.message: A new season has begun. Check your dashboard for your board's goals and your squad for the season ahead.

raceResult.title: Race result is in
raceResult.message: {race} has been run. View the result.

stageResult.title: Stage result is in
stageResult.message: Stage {stage} of {race} is done. Your best: {rider}, position {position}.

contractExpiring.title: Contract expiring
contractExpiring.message: {rider}'s contract expires at the end of season {season}.

boardT1Reminder.title: Last chance: {planLabel}
boardT1Reminder.messageSingle: The board takes over in {daysLeft} day. Open the Board page and negotiate your {planLabel} now.
boardT1Reminder.messageMulti: The board takes over in {daysLeft} days. Open the Board page and negotiate your {planLabel} now.

boardAutoAccepted.title: The board chose {planLabel} for you
boardAutoAccepted.message: You didn't negotiate your {planLabel} in time. The board picked focus "{focus}" and default goals. You can still request changes once the plan is running.

debtWarning.title: ⚠️ Negative balance
debtWarning.message: Your team has a negative balance. Check the Finances page for details.

24h.title: Deadline Day in 24 hours
24h.message: The transfer window closes in 24 hours. Last chance to list riders for auction or accept offers.

2h.title: Deadline Day in 2 hours
2h.message: The transfer window closes in 2 hours. Flash auctions and urgent bids are active.

30min.title: Deadline Day in 30 minutes
30min.message: Last chance: the transfer window closes in 30 minutes.

watchlistAuction.title: Watchlisted rider up for auction
watchlistAuction.message: {riderName} is up for auction (starting price {startPrice} CZ$)

offerAccepted.title: Offer accepted: confirm the deal
offerAccepted.message: {sellerName} accepted your offer on {riderName} for {price} CZ$. Confirm to complete the deal.

counterAccepted.title: Counter-offer accepted: confirm the deal
counterAccepted.message: {buyerName} accepted your counter-offer on {riderName} for {price} CZ$. Confirm to complete the deal.

cancelled.title: Transfer cancelled
cancelled.message: {actorName} pulled out of the deal on {riderName}.

onAuctionCancelled.title: Transfer cancelled
onAuctionCancelled.message: {riderName} went to an active auction. The deal was cancelled. Bid on the auction instead.

staleCancelled.title: Transfer cancelled
staleCancelled.message: {riderName} could not be completed because the rider changed status during confirmation.

completed.title: Transfer completed!
completed.messageDeferred: {riderName} was traded for {price} CZ$. They change teams once their ongoing stage race finishes.

issue.title: Transfer cancelled
issue.sellerNoLongerOwns: {riderName} could not be completed because the rider is no longer on the seller's team.
issue.sellerSquadTooSmall: {riderName} could not be sold because the seller would otherwise drop below {minRiders} riders in Division {division}.
issue.buyerSquadFull: {riderName} could not be transferred because the buyer's team is already full.
issue.buyerCannotAfford: The deal on {riderName} could not be completed because the buyer lacks funds.
issue.offeredMoved: {offeredName} is no longer available for the swap.
issue.requestedMoved: {requestedName} is no longer available for the swap.
issue.proposingCannotAfford: The swap {offeredName} ⇄ {requestedName} could not be completed because the proposing team lacks funds.
issue.receivingCannotAfford: The swap {offeredName} ⇄ {requestedName} could not be completed because the receiving team lacks funds.

swapAccepted.title: Swap accepted: confirm the deal
swapAccepted.message: {accepterName} accepted the swap: {offeredName} ⇄ {requestedName}. Confirm to complete.
swapAccepted.messageCash: {accepterName} accepted the swap: {offeredName} ⇄ {requestedName} · {cashSign}{cash} CZ$. Confirm to complete.

swapCounterAccepted.title: Counter-offer accepted: confirm the deal
swapCounterAccepted.message: {accepterName} accepted your counter-offer. Confirm to complete the swap.

swapCompleted.title: Swap completed!
swapCompleted.messageDeferred: {offeredName} ⇄ {requestedName} swapped. The riders change teams once their ongoing stage race finishes.

adminTransferCancelled.title: Deal cancelled by admin
adminTransferCancelled.message: The deal on {riderName} was cancelled by an admin.
adminTransferCancelled.messageReason: The deal on {riderName} was cancelled by an admin: {reason}

adminSwapCancelled.title: Swap cancelled by admin
adminSwapCancelled.message: The swap {offeredName} ⇄ {requestedName} was cancelled by an admin.
adminSwapCancelled.messageReason: The swap {offeredName} ⇄ {requestedName} was cancelled by an admin: {reason}

error.repayInsufficient: You only have {available} CZ$ available. The rest is locked in active bids or autobids
error.boardSigningRestriction: The board blocks purchases above {threshold} CZ$ (satisfaction below {satisfaction}%).
error.boardSalaryCap: Salary cap set by the board ({cap} CZ$). You cannot increase the team's total salary. Sell a rider first.
error.debtCapReached: Debt cap of {ceiling} CZ$ reached for this division

explanation.variable: Base {base} + variable {variable} based on last season's points/rank.
